mapper.select:
SELECT monitoring.airway_reservation_id, monitoring.airway_id, monitoring.airway_administrator_id,
monitoring.monitoring_information, monitoring.operator_id FROM t_monitoring_information as monitoring JOIN t_airway_reservation as reservation ON (monitoring.airway_reservation_id = reservation.airway_reservation_id) WHERE reservation.end_at BETWEEN #{startAt} AND #{endAt}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_monitoring_information
airway_reservation_id,
monitoring_information,
airway_administrator_id,
operator_id,
airway_id,
#{airwayReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{monitoringInformation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{airwayAdministratorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{airwayId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select:
SELECT airway_reservation_id, monitoring_information, airway_administrator_id, operator_id, airway_id, operator_id, airway_id FROM t_monitoring_information WHERE
airway_administrator_id = #{airwayAdministratorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
operator_id = #{operatorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
airway_id = #{airwayId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
EXISTS (select 1 FROM v_airway_design_area_info_section WHERE v_airway_design_area_info_section.airway_id = t_monitoring_information.airway_id and ST_Intersects(v_airway_design_area_info_section.geometry, ST_GeomFromText(#{coordinates, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 4326) ) ) AND
t_monitoring_information.airway_reservation_id IN ( SELECT t_airway_reservation.airway_reservation_id FROM t_airway_reservation WHERE end_at BETWEEN #{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
